name: FRITZ TORWELT || GUITAR PLAYER
description:
You all thought it was a good idea to take a trip to a waterpark resort.

3/4 band series

A little fun, a little depressed. Perfect mix! Now Fritz is lost and is looking for you at the waterpark!

Sorry I've made everyone wait so long for the band series! Seriously lacking motivation rn 😭
creator: Cherriqi
